title: campanula saxifraga subsp. aucheri
intro: Campanula saxifraga subsp. aucheri, also known as Aucheri's bellflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to the mountains of Eastern Turkey and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aucheri's bellflower include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
